                Employment and Unemployment
                Developments, May 1979



                     Employment rose slightly in May, and unemployment             Industry payroll employment
                 was unchanged. The Nation's unemployment rate was                     Nonfarm payroll employment, at 88.4 million, rose by
                 5.8 percent the same as in April; it has been in the 5.7          170,000 in May following no change in April. The small
                 to 5.9 percent range for the past 10 months.                      increase since March was in sharp contrast to the situation

                                                                       Explanatory Notes

                                    These explanatory notes provide information on the concepts, methodology, and scope of Household Data
                                    (A tables), Establishment Data (B, C, and D tables), and State and Area Unemployment Data (E table) pub-
                                    lished in Employment and Earnings.



                                                                               Introduction

                    The statistics in this periodical are compiled from two major            Employment
                 sources: (1) Household interviews, and (2) reports from employers.
